meta.description: Active tasks only. Completed work has been moved to kanban-archive.json to keep this board focused and useful. Keyboard-primary 3D Lego-style builder (god POV, procedural bricks, joyful nostalgic aesthetic).

tasks.title: Full rich PiecePalette React component (search + keyboard nav)
tasks.description: Filterable grid or list. Arrow keys navigate. Enter places. Visual mini previews.

tasks.title: Inspector panel for selected piece (live edit)
tasks.description: Show position/rotation/color. Allow numeric nudge + color change that mutates store.

tasks.title: Dynamic expandable grid visuals
tasks.description: Grid grows visually or uses infinite + distance fade. Allow placement far out.
references: drei Grid docs + three LineSegments examples

tasks.title: View presets + ortho toggle (1=Top, 2=Front etc.)
tasks.description: Keyboard sets camera position + target + projection (perspective/ortho).

tasks.title: Complete keyboard reference overlay (H key)
tasks.description: Comprehensive, accurate, categorized help. Update as features land.

tasks.title: Performance pass: instancing + frustum culling + profiling
tasks.description: Target 60 fps with 2000+ bricks. Add simple Stats or custom FPS. Document quality settings.

tasks.title: JSON import + basic validation on load
tasks.description: Allow pasting or file upload of previous saves. Sanitize data.

tasks.title: README with full keyboard cheatsheet + quick start
tasks.description: Excellent onboarding. Screenshots or GIFs of building flow.

tasks.title: Create detailed kanban.json from this plan (living artifact)
tasks.description: Seed 50-80 granular tasks with references. Keep updated during execution.

tasks.title: LDraw research + prototype loader (hybrid path)
tasks.description: Study https://github.com/LasseD/buildinginstructions.js . Add docs/ task + optional loader toggle for common parts.

tasks.title: Add more piece types (minifig head/torso as special, baseplates)
tasks.description: Extend catalog and geometry. Treat tall/special pieces correctly for height/footprint.

tasks.title: Build 3-4 showcase example models in code or as loadable JSON
tasks.description: Ship with nice demo worlds (castle wall section, small vehicle, tower).

tasks.title: Final verification: full keyboard building session + export + reload
tasks.description: Build recognizable structure using only keyboard. Save, reload, export GLB, verify in external viewer. 60fps @ 1000 pieces.

tasks.title: Polish: accessibility (focus, aria, key hints)
tasks.description: Ensure all panels keyboard navigable. Good focus states.

tasks.title: Implement game-like Web Audio sound system
tasks.description: Create src/lib/audio.ts. Satisfying plastic 'clack' on place (short noise burst + pitched tone with envelope), soft pick on select/cursor move, delete pop. Slight random variation for natural feel. Trigger from placement logic and UI interactions. Keep tasteful and not overwhelming.
references: Web Audio API noise + filter techniques for click sounds
Classic video game 'lego clack' sound design references

tasks.title: Nostalgic joyful UI redesign (non-generic, LEGO game aesthetic)
tasks.description: Redesign all panels, palette, color picker, status from current dark pro to tasteful joyful nostalgic look: light creamy/soft gray panels, rounded 'tray' style, prominent use of real LEGO color names and swatches. Piece buttons that feel like physical bricks. Avoid generic modern flat/minimal. Inspired by LEGO Digital Designer UI + cheerful early LEGO PC game interfaces. Bright but balanced, not saturating.
references: LEGO Digital Designer screenshots and UI patterns
Classic LEGO Creator / LEGO Island game UI aesthetics
Official LEGO color palette references (BrickLink color guide)

tasks.title: Game-like placement & interaction feedback (animations + feel)
tasks.description: Add subtle joyful feedback while keeping builder focus: scale/pop or slight bounce animation when placing a brick, ghost piece that feels 'held', nice highlight on valid placement, cursor that communicates current piece. Combine with sound (L3D-039). Make the builder feel alive and satisfying like the best LEGO digital experiences.
references: three.js + R3F animation patterns (useFrame or react-spring)

tasks.title: Curated joyful tasteful color palette + material integration
tasks.description: Define and use a beautiful, non-saturating LEGO-inspired palette (20-30 colors) with official-ish names. Wire into materials so bricks look premium and joyful in the new lighting. Update swatches and defaults.
